title: Jeng (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:SarrissaJeng-AOTC.png|thumb|right|250px|[[Sarissa Jeng]]]]
'''Jeng''' could refer to any of the following individuals:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Sarrissa Jeng]]''', a member of the [[Jedi]] [[Jedi assault team|assault team]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Jeng Droga]]''', an [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] who served [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
*'''[[Jeng Seth]]''', leader of the [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] [[The Skulls]].
*'''[[Sarrissa Jeng/Legends|Sarrissa Jeng]]''', a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served on the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Geonosis strike team|strike team]] during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].
{{Disambig}}
